source.head: addb5cd3f30c4e9eef9b25084419bd1c5015e169
source.summary: addb5cd3f fix(release): hotfix 3.7.0-alpha.11 — strip workspace: protocol leak (#1825) (#1827)
notes: Cloned under /Users/bradleydipaolo/stratos-ai/external/ruflo, outside the Stratos repo to avoid committing the large upstream monorepo/binary artifacts.
Git clone produced case-collision warnings on macOS for duplicated SKILL.md/skill.md paths; upstream still cloned and can be inspected.

positioning: Ruflo becomes the Stratos day-to-day orchestration layer for multi-agent operating routines: morning planning, build swarms, QA swarms, memory capture, and end-of-day handoff. Hermes/Codex still execute the work; Ruflo tracks, coordinates, routes, and stores patterns.
operatingRule: Use Ruflo as the ledger/orchestrator, not as a magic builder. After any Ruflo command, Hermes/Codex must immediately continue doing the actual implementation, validation, and shipping.

dailyRhythm.intent: Plan the day and search prior patterns before building.
dailyRhythm.stratosAction: Open Today Action Board, choose one revenue task, then move the target lead in CRM.

dailyRhythm.intent: Start a small hierarchical swarm for implementation/QA tracking.
dailyRhythm.command: python3 scripts/ruflo_daily.py build --objective "upgrade Stratos demo or automation"
dailyRhythm.stratosAction: Use Command Center module links: demos, pricing, proof, n8n, or ops.

dailyRhythm.intent: Spawn tester/reviewer coordination records before validation.
dailyRhythm.command: python3 scripts/ruflo_daily.py qa --objective "validate Stratos public export"
dailyRhythm.stratosAction: Run scripts/run_all.py, browser smoke, and proof guardrails.

dailyRhythm.intent: Store what worked so future Stratos work repeats the pattern.
dailyRhythm.command: python3 scripts/ruflo_daily.py close --note "what shipped and what worked"
dailyRhythm.stratosAction: Update proof vault/briefing and commit only validated assets.

useCases.name: Premium demo build swarm
useCases.output: Data pack + deterministic generator + browser QA + public export

useCases.name: Outbound/CRM execution swarm
useCases.output: Prioritized leads, pitch links, CRM statuses, follow-up queue

useCases.name: Automation delivery swarm
useCases.output: Workflow scope, credential checklist, QA checklist, proof ledger

useCases.name: End-of-day learning loop
useCases.output: Pattern stored in Ruflo memory plus Stratos briefing update

safeCommands.label: Build swarm record
safeCommands.cmd: python3 scripts/ruflo_daily.py build --objective "build the next Stratos growth asset"

safeCommands.label: QA swarm record
safeCommands.cmd: python3 scripts/ruflo_daily.py qa --objective "validate Stratos command center export"

safeCommands.label: Closeout memory note
safeCommands.cmd: python3 scripts/ruflo_daily.py close --note "validated and shipped Stratos update"

safeCommands.label: Full Stratos validation after Ruflo-coordinated work
